titleStmt.title: SII 38.582: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 582.

p.hi: King: Hajarata Sultāna Abdula Hasanu Alaṁgi[ru] Pannāha (Abdul Hasan Qutb Shah) Year: Śaka 1602, Raudri, Vaiśākha, śu. di. 3 Monday = 21 April 1680 A.D. But the day was Wednesday.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of fields, gardens and coconut groves to the temple of Śānta Naṁjuṇḍēśvara for providing sacred water (abhishēkam), oil lamps and other offerings (nivedya) to the god for the merit of Hazarat Sultan by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇams of (old) Lēpākshi-sthaḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śāṁtanaṁjuṁḍēśvarasvāmi svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1602 Agunēṭi ravudrināma saṁvatsaraṁ vayiśākha śu 3 sōmavāraṁ
nāḍu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyakulayina śrīśāṁtanaṁ
juṁḍēśvarasvāmi nityābhiṣēka nayivēdya dīpārādhana A¨rcanāvrittivai
bhavādulaku yiccina bhūdāna dha¨rmmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁ
nanu hajaratusulutānu Abdulahasānu Ālaṁ
gīru phaṁnyāhāgāru rājyaṁ yēlucuvuṁḍa
(gā) hajarat yelina vāriki sukṛtaṁgānu prā lēpākṣistaḷaṁ
reḍḍikaraṇālu yiccina bhūdānadha¨rmaśāsanaprati staḷani¨rde
(veṁ)maḍi ceruvu kiṁda śrīśāṁtanaṁjuḍēśvarasvāmi dēva
sthānaṁ kiṁdi kōnēraṁcu maḍilō 2 yiddumu dēvaḷanaku vutta
raṁ nāgalakaṭṭa kiṁda baṁḍaṁbu maḍimēla 2 Iddumu vubhayaṁ ma
ḍi nalutumu tōṭalu dēvaḷānaku paḍamaramallaṁbhaṭla maḍikiṁda
māmiḍimaṭlanēlalō yirsamaḍi saṁma rima
ḍiki paḍamara ṭeṁkāyatōṭalō tavāye
samaḍi sthaḷānku vuttaraṁgā Acipāṭi
ma teṁkāya tōṭlō yippamākula nelalō 1 tū
mu sthaḷālalō yiddumu
Digital edition of SII 38.582 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
